---
description: Frontend visual design principles for component and demo UI
globs: demo/**,src/styles.ts,src/feature-cards.ts
alwaysApply: false
---

# Frontend design principles

## Visual language

- **Token-first.** Component colours/spacing live in `--fc-*` (`src/styles.ts`).
  Demo page chrome uses separate `--page-*` tokens (`demo/demo.css`). Never
  hard-code hex values in markup or TS.
- **Adaptive colour.** Use `light-dark()` for every surface, text, and border
  token. Support `prefers-contrast: more` with stronger borders and promoted
  muted text.
- **System typography.** Stack: `system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto,
  sans-serif`. Scale with `clamp()` â€” no fixed px headings on the demo page.
- **Restraint.** One accent colour per card (eyebrow, figure, CTA, focus ring).
  Muted copy for descriptions; weight and size carry hierarchy, not rainbow
  borders.

## Layout & responsiveness

- **Container over viewport.** Cards respond to the host width via
  `container-type: inline-size` and `@container` â€” never `@media` width
  breakpoints inside the component.
- **Grid, not flex hacks.** `repeat(auto-fit, minmax(...))` for card tracks;
  `columns` attribute only caps track count.
- **Demo page rhythm.** Centered column (hero ~56rem, main ~64rem), stacked
  `.block` sections with `.block-note` intro copy. Generous vertical spacing via
  `clamp()`.

## Interaction & motion

- Wrap all transforms/transitions in
  `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)`.
- Hover: subtle lift + shadow on cards; CTA arrow nudge. Active: lighter press
  state. Always pair with `:focus-visible` rings (`3px solid`, 2px offset).
- Demo controls (sliders, buttons, links) get the same focus treatment as
  cards.

## UX patterns

- **Progressive enhancement.** Pre-upgrade light-DOM links must look usable
  (`feature-cards:not(:defined)`). After upgrade, do not duplicate title text
  as a CTA â€” use `data-cta` or omit the CTA span when labels match.
- **Async feedback.** Remote `src` loads show a loading state; failures show an
  error panel when no fallback content exists. Demo CMS section uses a status
  pill (`#cms-status`) driven by component events â€” not silent blanks.
- **Playground honesty.** Theme controls must target cards **without** per-card
  `data-theme` overrides, or document which tokens are overridden. Show live
  values for range inputs (`<output>`).

## Polish checklist

Before shipping UI changes:

1. axe zero violations (`npm run test:a11y`)
2. Keyboard path still complete (`npm run test:e2e`)
3. Update visual baselines intentionally (`npm run test:visual -- --update-snapshots`)
4. Reduced-motion path disables animation (`prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`)
